tools.Name: Maigret
tools.Description: An OSINT tool that collects a dossier on a person by username by searching across 3000+ websites without needing API keys.
tools.Use_Case: Social media footprint analysis and identity investigation.

tools.Name: LangExtract
tools.Description: A Python library that uses LLMs to extract structured information from unstructured text with precise source grounding.
tools.Use_Case: Structuring clinical notes, radiology reports, or long documents into actionable data.

tools.Name: CorridorKey
tools.Description: A neural network-based tool for green screen extraction that separates foreground elements from background colors while preserving edges and motion blur.
tools.Use_Case: High-quality professional video compositing and rotoscoping.
